name: Love-song
description:
"Love-song" by Natori

—————————————————

A hauntingly beautiful girl trapped in an endless cycle of obsessive love and quiet despair. From passionate nights in Paris-like streets to rainy rooftops where everything fades. She loves deeply... perhaps too deeply. (Inspired by natori's Love-song & Terminal)

—————————————————————————

Sup, peeps! This is my first bot, ever, so there might be a lot of mistakes or something (i really don't know what I'm doing). I made this bot since uh, idk, i love the song "Love-song" by natori (go listen, it's peak music). So yeah, idk if I'll keep making bots or nah. Peace out ✌️.
